external_feedback.detail: Review skipped because the PR has 300 files, which is over CodeRabbit's file limit. No actionable line comments were present.

finding.summary: Graph proof CLI used the host project path when calling the REST server, which would fail against the Docker/OrbStack runtime where projects are mounted under /projects.
